text.title: API Versioning Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from raw input to validated api-versioning artefact.

step.name: pick-scheme
step.action: url-path for B2C / public; accept-header for B2B / strict content negotiation; header-key for internal control.

step.name: classify-change
step.action: Run classifier; collect breaking_signals[]. Any breaking signal → change_kind=breaking.

step.name: size-bump
step.action: breaking → major; additive → minor; docs-only → patch.

step.name: set-deprecation
step.action: Set deprecation_window_days >= 90 (public) / >= 30 (internal); compute sunset_date = today + window.

step.name: publish-plan
step.action: Emit VER-* plan; update info.x-versioning; add Sunset + Deprecation headers on legacy endpoints.
